session.user: Run `make prettier` and report results. This should auto-fix the 2 formatting issues in docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md and docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md.
session.assistant: I'll run `make prettier` to auto-fix the formatting issues.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run prettier to auto-fix formatting issues

session.assistant: The output is truncated, but I can see the formatter processed many files. Let me check specifically for the two files you mentioned:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Show formatting changes to the two target files

session.tool_result:
diff --git a/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md b/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md index 71742427a..95b099023 100644 --- a/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md +++ b/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md @@ -50,7 +50,7 @@ The `review_decision: str | None` field on `PullRequestInfo` in `packages/erk-sh
| `review_decision` value | Indicator added | | ----------------------- | --------------- | -| `"APPROVED"` | `✔` suffix | +| `"APPROVED"` | `✔` suffix | | `"CHANGES_REQUESTED"` | `❌` suffix | | `"REVIEW_REQUIRED"` | No indicator | | `None` | No indicator | diff --git a/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md b/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md index 70e2ae9b5..58a90435d 100644 --- a/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md +++ b/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md @@ -63,7 +63,7 @@ Both public functions delegate to a shared helper that returns a list of emoji s | 🚧 | Draft PR | Active stages (planned, implementing, review) when `is_draft=True` | | 👀 | Published PR | Active stages when `is_draft=False` | | 💥 | Merge conflicts | Implementing, implemented, or review when `has_conflicts=True` | -| ✔ | Approved | Review stage when `review_decision="APPROVED"` | +| ✔ | Approved | Review stage when `review_decision="APPROVED"` | | ❌ | Changes requested | Review stage when `review_decision="CHANGES_REQUESTED"` | | 🚀 | Ready to merge | Implemented stage when checks pass, no unresolved comments, no conflicts |
session.assistant:
Perfect! Prettier successfully auto-fixed the formatting issues:
**Prettier passed: 2 formatting issues auto-fixed**
Summary of changes: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - Fixed spacing alignment in the table row for `"APPROVED"` indicator (added 1 space for alignment) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` - Fixed spacing alignment for the `✔` symbol in the table to align with other emoji symbols in the column
Both files had minor table formatting inconsistencies that were corrected to match Prettier's markdown formatting standards.
